subject: a humanoid figure swinging a golden energy lasso or whip in a dramatic action pose on a rocky Zendikar landscape
description: A humanoid figure with long dark hair stands in a power stance on a rocky landscape, one arm raised and swinging forward. Three golden energy arcs trail from the outstretched arm across the image, forming a lasso or whip-like pattern. The figure wears layered armor with ornate goldwork on the chest. In the background, Zendikar's distinctive floating rock columns and hazy sky are visible. The gesture is forceful and commanding. The figure's face is visible and determined.
foreground: armored humanoid figure swinging golden energy arcs, ornate gold chest armor
background: Zendikar floating rock columns, hazy sky
